summary: Restore the opencode-cli-v2 migration subtree into an isolated branch for continued integration and package-boundary hardening.
root_cause: The unresolved stash contained a coherent CLI v2 migration subtree that should be preserved independently from the main runtime/config restoration work.
fix_approach: Restored the full CLI v2 subtree into a dedicated worktree, installed its local dependencies, and ran representative plus full test slices to determine current readiness.

validation.notes: Representative CLI tests passed after dependency install, but the full suite still has package-boundary issues around oh-my-opencode import resolution and opencode-sisyphus-state adapter loading. The subtree is preserved for follow-up, not merge-ready.
